metadata.description: Free Claude Code plugins from Alex Tong — skills for AI-assisted development and printable educational worksheets.

plugins.name: workspace
plugins.description: Create team workspaces with shared context across multiple repos — generates repo registry, CLAUDE.md scaffold, Makefile, and bootstrap scripts.

plugins.name: pr
plugins.description: PR workflow skills — generate structured PR descriptions from your branch diff.

plugins.name: education
plugins.description: Educational content skills — create beautiful, printable worksheets as self-contained HTML files for any grade level, subject, or audience.

plugins.name: claude-brain
plugins.description: Claude Code context quality skills — audit CLAUDE.md and .claude/rules/ files for staleness, contradictions, and missing context.
